name: Zukovstheworld
description: '''Kwasi Frempong-Manso''' (born 23 February 2003), known professionally as '''Zukovstheworld''', is an English rapper, singer and producer from [[Thornton Heath|Thornton Heath, South London]]. British magazine ''[[Dazed]]'' credited Frempong-Manso as a pioneer of the "[[UK underground rap|UK Ug]] scene".
